heightSm.$description: Small button height — compact toolbars, inline actions.

heightMd.$description: Default button height — most form contexts.

heightLg.$description: Large button height — primary CTAs, prominent actions.

minWidth.$description: Minimum button width to prevent text wrapping on short labels.

maxWidth.$description: Maximum button width — prevents overly wide buttons in wide containers.

heightSm.$description: Small input height — dense forms, filter bars.

heightLg.$description: Large input height — prominent search fields.

maxWidth.$description: Maximum input width — constrains inline inputs.

xs.$description: Extra-small icon — decorative or badge context.

sm.$description: Small icon — inline text icons, list item icons.

md.$description: Default icon size — buttons, nav items.

lg.$description: Large icon — section headers, empty states.

xs.$description: Extra-small avatar — comment threads, dense lists.

sm.$description: Small avatar — inline mentions, compact nav.

md.$description: Default avatar size — list rows, dropdowns.
